summary: Added typed brokerage read/write commands under the existing 'brokerage' parent (accounts, ceres-accounts, account, account-switcher, positions, portfolios, instrument, quote, orders[+place/cancel], options[positions/orders/chain/instruments/marketdata/place/cancel], performance, transfers[+relationships/unified], dividends, history, watchlist[+items/add/remove]).
reason: The generated CLI was crypto-only (official Crypto API). Zayd wanted the brokerage surface (~90%) captured in the live API map. Each command targets a specific captured endpoint and reuses brokeragemap.Execute (the existing Bearer-token, multi-host, rate-limited, write-gated transport) rather than the crypto client, which speaks x-api-key+ed25519 and cannot reach brokerage hosts. Writes default to dry-run and require --live-write + ROBINHOOD_PP_ALLOW_WRITES=1; trades are never auto-executed.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass; verify-skill passes; orders place auto-falls-back to dry-run without --live-write; reads exit 5 on auth/HTTP failure.
